allow: PowerShell(cd D:\\GBMjobhunter; $env:NODE_ENV="development"; npm run web 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40)

PowerShell($body = '{"email":"test@example.com","password":"password123"}'; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/auth/register" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Status:" $response.StatusCode; Write-Host "Body:" $response.Content)

PowerShell(try { $body = '{"email":"test2@example.com","password":"password123"}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/auth/register" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; Write-Host "Status:" $r.StatusCode; $r.Content } catch { Write-Host "Status:" $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; $_.ErrorDetails.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/auth/register" -Method POST -Body '{"email":"test3@example.com","password":"password123"}' -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host $r.StatusCode; $r.Content } catch { Write-Host "Error:" $_.Exception.Message; $_.ErrorDetails.Message })

PowerShell(Set-Content -Path "$env:TEMP\\reg.json" -Value '{"email":"test@example.com","password":"password123"}' -Encoding utf8; curl.exe -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/auth/register -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "@$env:TEMP\\reg.json")

PowerShell(Set-Content -Path "$env:TEMP\\reg.json" -Value '{"email":"newuser@example.com","password":"password123"}' -Encoding utf8; curl.exe -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/auth/register -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "@$env:TEMP\\reg.json")

PowerShell(Set-Content -Path "$env:TEMP\\reg.json" -Value '{"email":"surya@example.com","password":"password123"}' -Encoding utf8; curl.exe -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/auth/register -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "@$env:TEMP\\reg.json")

PowerShell(Set-Content "$env:TEMP\\reg2.json" '{"email":"surya@example.com","password":"password123"}'; $result = curl.exe --max-time 10 -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/auth/register -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "@$env:TEMP\\reg2.json"; Write-Host $result)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Set-Content "$env:TEMP\\reg3.json" '{"email":"surya@example.com","password":"password123"}'; curl.exe --max-time 8 -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/auth/register -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "@$env:TEMP\\reg3.json")
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq "node" } | Select-Object Id, Name | Format-Table)
